calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Stanley Riddell, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Clark Fong and Maria Fong.
Plaintiff's Witness: Clark Fong, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Diego Raygoza
No appearance by the Defaulted Co-Defendants: Carmen raygoza, Gilberto Cruz and Adeline Raygoza.
Exhibit 1- Three-Day Notice------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1730 33rd Ave., San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $23,683.00
No Fees or Costs, for a Total of $23,683.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Stanley W. Riddell, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Clark Fong

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. Plaintiff Clark fong's motion for evidentiary and monetary sanctions is Granted. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Stanley W. Riddell, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Clark Fong and Maria Fong

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Clark Fong's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents (set #1) is Granted. Compliance within 5 days of notice of order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
